An Invitation

Two souls,
one auspicious dawn

With the blessings of the divine and the warmth of our families, we invite you to witness the sacred union of Vaishak and Sreepriya — bound by destiny, sealed by love, and cherished by all who hold them dear.

✦   ✦   ✦

Your presence would be our greatest joy. Come, let us gather in prayer, laughter, and love.
